mapper.insert: insert into sboard2 ( ID, APP_USER_ID, BTITLE, BCONTENT, BPASS, BFILE, BIP ) values ( sboard2_seq.nextval, #{appUserId, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{btitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bcontent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bpass, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bfile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bip, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: update sboard2 set bhit = bhit + 1 where id=#{id, jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.delete: delete from sboard2 where id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} and BPASS = #{bpass, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select * from sboard2 order by id desc
select * from sboard2 where id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sboard2 WHERE btitle LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
